parameters.query: =SELECT DISTINCT s.email, COALESCE(s.name, '') as name FROM subscribers s JOIN subscriber_lists sl ON s.id = sl.subscriber_id JOIN lists l ON sl.list_id = l.id WHERE l.uuid = '{{ $json.body.listUuid }}' AND s.status = 'enabled'

=SELECT DISTINCT s.email, COALESCE(s.name, '') as name FROM subscribers s JOIN subscriber_lists sl ON s.id = sl.subscriber_id JOIN lists l ON sl.list_id = l.id WHERE l.uuid = '{{ $json.body.listUuid }}' AND s.status = 'enabled'
